title: malvastrum nesioticum subsp. nuttallii
intro: Malvastrum nesioticum subsp. nuttallii, also known as the desert holly or Nuttall's malvastrum, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malvastrum nesioticum subsp. nuttallii include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
